seo.title: 10 Best Hotels in Lopburi 2026 — Old Town, New Town & Near Sunflower Fields
seo.metaDescription: Find the best hotels in Lopburi for every budget. From Old Town guesthouses to New Town mid-range hotels and a resort near the sunflower fields. Real prices and honest reviews.

intro: Lopburi's accommodation divides cleanly between two areas. The Old Town (west of the railway) puts you walking distance from every historical site but has limited hotel options — mostly budget guesthouses. The New Town (east of the railway) has better-quality mid-range hotels and is connected to the Old Town by 10-THB songthaew or short tuk-tuk ride. For the sunflower fields, there are a couple of resort options near Khao Chin Lae, 40 km north. Lopburi is genuinely affordable — even mid-range hotels rarely exceed 2,000 THB/night.

hotels.name: Noom Guesthouse
hotels.description: The most popular backpacker guesthouse in Lopburi's Old Town, offering a range of room types from dormitories to private bungalows in a leafy compound. Friendly, knowledgeable staff who have been hosting travelers for years and can advise on everything from monkey safety to sunflower field timing. Onsite restaurant serving Thai and international food at budget prices. Walking distance to Prang Sam Yot, Phra Narai Palace, and all Old Town ruins.
highlights: Walking distance to all Old Town historical sites
Knowledgeable staff with excellent local knowledge
Variety of room types from dorms to private bungalows
Onsite restaurant with Thai and international dishes (50-120 THB)

hotels.name: Hop Inn Lopburi
hotels.description: Part of Thailand's reliable budget chain with consistent standards across the country. Clean, well-maintained rooms with air conditioning, hot shower, free WiFi, and free private parking. The no-frills approach keeps prices low while maintaining comfort. Located in the New Town with easy transport links to the Old Town. The Thai chain model means you know exactly what to expect — it's not exciting, but it's dependable at this price point.
highlights: Reliable Thai budget chain — consistent standards
Free WiFi and private parking
Good value for solo or couple travelers
Easy songthaew connection to Old Town (10 THB)

hotels.name: Pannara Hotel
hotels.description: A well-reviewed budget hotel popular with both Thai and international travelers for its central location and good service. Simple but clean rooms with air conditioning and hot water. Excellent base for exploring the Old Town ruins on foot. Staff speak enough English to assist with transport and attraction questions. One of the best-value options in the central area.
highlights: Centrally located near Old Town ruins
Good service for a budget property
Clean rooms with reliable AC
Popular with both Thai and international guests

hotels.name: Lopburi Inn Hotel
hotels.description: A long-established budget hotel at 28/9 Naraimaharat Road, 0.5 km from the city center. Basic rooms with air conditioning, TV, mini fridge, and WiFi. The price point makes it one of Lopburi's cheapest AC options, and the location is convenient for the Old Town ruins. Some rooms face the street and can be noisy — request a rear room. Mixed reviews on maintenance standards, but hard to beat for sheer value in the Old Town area.
highlights: Among the cheapest AC rooms in the Old Town
Location close to historical sites
Rooms with TV, mini fridge and WiFi at budget price
Long-standing property with experienced local staff

hotels.name: DadD Resort by Lopburi Inn Resort
hotels.description: The best mid-range option in Lopburi proper — a full resort setup with an outdoor swimming pool, 24-hour front desk, buffet breakfast, free WiFi, and spacious air-conditioned rooms. The motel-style layout gives direct parking to your room. 90 rooms with room service, restaurant, and laundry facilities. Consistently good staff reviews. Located in the New Town, a quick songthaew ride from the Old Town ruins. A genuine step up from the guesthouses without breaking the budget.
highlights: Outdoor swimming pool — a real plus in Lopburi's heat
Buffet breakfast included in most rates
Spacious rooms with direct parking access
24-hour front desk and room service

hotels.name: O2 Hotel Lopburi
hotels.description: A modern 3-star hotel in the New Town with a garden, air-conditioned rooms, free WiFi, and a contemporary design that stands out from Lopburi's generally older hotel stock. Clean, well-maintained rooms with thoughtful modern touches. A reliable choice for travelers who want more comfort than a guesthouse without paying significantly more. Good base for exploring both Old Town ruins and New Town services.
highlights: Modern 3-star design — more contemporary than most Lopburi options
Garden area and clean common spaces
Free WiFi and AC in all rooms
New Town location with transport to Old Town

hotels.name: Narai Iyara Palace
hotels.description: A 41-room boutique hotel with balcony rooms, flat-screen TVs, and mountain views. Named appropriately after King Narai, this property delivers a more upscale feel than the price suggests — complimentary bottled water, dry cleaning service, and friendly staff. Guest reviews consistently praise the cleanliness, quiet atmosphere, and accommodating team. An excellent value option combining comfort and competitive pricing.
highlights: All rooms have balconies with views
Quieter, more boutique feel than the chain hotels
Consistently praised for cleanliness and staff quality
Good value at the price point

hotels.name: Sri Intra Hotel
hotels.description: One of Lopburi's newer mid-range properties, offering 24-hour front desk, luggage storage, and free WiFi in a clean modern facility. Spacious air-conditioned rooms with flat-screen TVs. Located slightly outside the city center in the Tha Hin area, making it a better fit for travelers with their own transport who want a quiet setting away from the Old Town bustle. Good option for those visiting the nearby Pasak Chonlasit Dam area.
highlights: Modern facility with consistent standards
24-hour front desk with luggage storage
Quieter location away from the Old Town crowds
Free WiFi and parking

hotels.name: Paklop Resort
hotels.area: Near Khao Chin Lae, north Lopburi
hotels.description: An 8-minute drive from Khao Chin Lae Sunflower Fields and the best accommodation option for visitors specifically targeting the seasonal sunflower bloom. Resort-style property with standard rooms and bungalows. The proximity to the fields makes early morning arrival easy — you can be at the sunflowers at sunrise before the crowds, which is essential for good photography. Facilities include parking, WiFi, and a restaurant. Limited options in this area make Paklop the default choice for sunflower-focused visits.
highlights: 8-minute drive to Khao Chin Lae Sunflower Fields
Best location for early morning sunflower visits
Resort-style setting in a quieter rural environment
Restaurant on site for meals between activities

hotels.name: MDR Hotel Lopburi
hotels.description: A solid modern hotel in the New Town frequently cited by travelers as one of Lopburi's better-value mid-range options. Clean rooms with reliable air conditioning, hot water, and free WiFi. The New Town location means more restaurant and convenience store options immediately nearby compared to Old Town guesthouses. Friendly staff and good breakfast options. A comfortable base that won't stretch the budget.
highlights: Popular choice among travelers for consistent quality
New Town location with restaurants and shops nearby
Clean modern rooms with reliable facilities
Good breakfast options

bookingTips: Book accommodation for Monkey Banquet Festival weekend (last Sunday November) at least 1 month ahead — Lopburi fills completely with domestic tourists
Old Town guesthouses are best for travelers without a vehicle — everything is walkable. New Town hotels need a 10-THB songthaew or 40-60 THB tuk-tuk to reach the ruins
For sunflower field visits (November-January), either stay near Khao Chin Lae (Paklop Resort) or stay in Lopburi city and drive up early morning — a 40 km round trip
Lopburi's hotel options are limited compared to major tourist cities — book ahead during peak season (Nov-Feb) and festival periods
Most Lopburi hotels are under 1,500 THB/night — this is genuinely cheap accommodation even by Thai standards. You don't need to compromise on basic quality
Check that your chosen hotel has functional air conditioning — Lopburi's summers (March-May) are extremely hot and fan rooms are uncomfortable
